dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook stderr false-blocks allowed decisions on Bash tool
dogfoodPatterns.description: claude-hook outputs to stderr for 'allowed' decisions (attempt 1/3 counter). Claude Code treats any PreToolUse hook stderr as blocking error. Readybench agents cannot git commit/push. WIP stash found in studio-em branch (claude-hook-wrapper.sh simplification) but fix must target apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Director: assign kernel-sr directly. Fix: allowed decisions → stdout only, no stderr. Reserve stderr for deny/violation/fatal errors.

dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1436 — no-governance-self-modification invariant now blocks writes to persona.env from tool calls. Bootstrap script (write-persona.sh) runs before hooks are active, unaffected.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On EM cycle startup, turbo not found in worktree node_modules. Must run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as pre-build step in EM startup scripts.
